free_text: Energy and mass distributions of fragments from fission
of Bi-209,Au-197,W-Nat and Yb-Nat by 1 GeV protons.
The proton beam of area 5 x 5 mm and intensity
10**19 protons/sec. The duration of the beam burst
was 10**(-3) sec and the repetition rate was 40 Hz.
